_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of Confidentiality, Integrity and Availability (CIA) principles and practices
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of global data protection regulations, including GDPR, CCPA/CPRA, LGPD, PDPA, and sector-specific privacy obligations, and the data management requirements each creates.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI SP domain. Knowledge SP-K-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RC-K-012 (RC, cosine: 0.526), SP-K-007 (SP, cosine: 0.521).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: Weak similarity (2.7/10). Limited semantic overlap detected. The relationship exists but the concepts diverge significantly in scope or application domain.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: Lower token-level alignment (F1=0.827). The concepts share limited contextual embedding similarity at the token level, consistent with cross-domain vocabulary divergence.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: Neutral-dominant (99.8%). The model finds the descriptions related but neither implying nor contradicting each other — typical for cross-domain framework mapping where concepts overlap without strict logical implication.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder (0.543) exceeds STS (0.266). The independent embeddings find more similarity than cross-attention, suggesting surface-level vocabulary overlap exceeds the deeper semantic relationship.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Low lexical overlap (10.7%). Limited shared vocabulary — the relationship is primarily semantic rather than terminological.
